mapper.insert: INSERT INTO "h_item" (gym_id, item_category, item_count, item_name, item_date, item_price, item_status, item_expiry_date) VALUES (#{gymId}, #{itemCategory}, #{itemCount}, #{itemName}, #{itemDate}, #{itemPrice}, #{itemStatus}, #{itemExpiryDate, jdbcType=DATE})
mapper.select:
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM "h_item" WHERE gym_id = #{gymId}
AND item_name LIKE CONCAT('%', #{pager.searchKeyword}, '%')

SELECT item_id as itemId, gym_id as gymId, item_category as itemCategory, item_count as itemCount, item_name as itemName, item_date as itemDate, item_price as itemPrice, item_status as itemStatus, item_expiry_date as itemExpiryDate FROM "h_item" WHERE item_id = #{itemId}
mapper.update: UPDATE "h_item" SET item_category = #{itemCategory}, item_count = #{itemCount}, item_name = #{itemName}, item_date = #{itemDate}, item_price = #{itemPrice}, item_status = #{itemStatus}, item_expiry_date = #{itemExpiryDate, jdbcType=DATE} WHERE item_id = #{itemId}
mapper.select: SELECT item_id as itemId, gym_id as gymId, item_category as itemCategory, item_count as itemCount, item_name as itemName, item_date as itemDate, item_price as itemPrice, item_status as itemStatus, item_expiry_date as itemExpiryDate FROM "h_item" WHERE item_expiry_date BETWEEN CURRENT_DATE AND CURRENT_DATE + INTERVAL '7 day'

SELECT item_id as itemId, gym_id as gymId, item_category as itemCategory, item_count as itemCount, item_name as itemName, item_date as itemDate, item_price as itemPrice, item_status as itemStatus, item_expiry_date as itemExpiryDate FROM "h_item" WHERE gym_id = #{gymId} AND item_category = #{category}
